allow: Bash(rm -f pw-check.tmp.mjs pw-pricing-order.mjs pw-screens.mjs pw-nav-crop.mjs pw-nav-crop2.mjs pw-nav-range.mjs shot-375.png shot-768.png shot-1280.png shot-768-nav.png shot-768-nav2.png debug-mobile-menu.png debug-nav-gap-1280.png)
Bash(powershell -Command 'Get-Process node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.MainWindowTitle -eq '\\'''\\'' } | Select-Object Id,ProcessName')

Bash(powershell -Command "Stop-Process -Id 28132 -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Stop-Process -Id 32180 -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; netstat -ano | Select-String ':5173.*LISTENING'")

PowerShell($conn = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5173 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($conn\) { $conn | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; "stopped" } else { "no listener found" })
